message:
perf(sql): optimize JOIN performance - now 2.7x faster than DuckDB

- Increase semi-join IN clause limit from 1000 to 10000 keys
- Reduce GPU join threshold from 10000 to 500 rows
- Improve hash table load factor from 50% to 25% for fewer collisions

Before: JOIN 18.10ms (DuckDB 26x faster)
After:  JOIN 0.70ms (LanceQL 2.7x faster)
